cards.name: Evasive Acrobatics
abilities: [keyword:Dodge]
When you [keyword:Dodge] with or play this card, you may also [keyword:Dodge] with another card from your hand.

cards.name: Widow's Bite
abilities: [keyword:Dodge]
[keyword:Dark Memories]

cards.name: Weave a Web of Spies
abilities: [keyword:Dodge]
If you drew any cards this turn, you may send one of your other Heroes [keyword:Undercover].

cards.name: Infiltrate the Conspiracy
abilities: You may send one of your Heroes [keyword:Undercover].
You get +3[icon:attack] if you have at least 4 Bystanders and/or Undercover Heroes in your Victory Pile.

cards.name: Strike and Fade
abilities: Send this [keyword:Undercover].

cards.name: Unveil Identity
abilities: [hc:instinct]: You may [keyword:Unleash] one of your Heroes from [keyword:Undercover].

cards.name: Twilight Ops
abilities: [keyword:Dodge]
When you [keyword:Dodge] with this card, you may [keyword:Unleash] one of your Heroes from [keyword:Undercover].
When you play this card, send it [keyword:Undercover].

cards.name: Destroy the Red Room
abilities: You may [keyword:Unleash] one of your Heroes from [keyword:Undercover].
You may send a Hero from your discard pile [keyword:Undercover].

cards.name: Sleeper Agent
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited]: Send this [keyword:Undercover].
When you fight a Villain, you may [keyword:Unleash] this card from [keyword:Undercover].
[hc:covert]: Draw a card.

cards.name: Magnetic Shield
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited]: Send this [keyword:Undercover].
When you recruit another [hc:covert] Hero, you may [keyword:Unleash] this card from [keyword:Undercover].
[hc:covert]: You get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Death Was Only a Ruse
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited]: Send this [keyword:Undercover].
When a Master Strike is completed or any player fights the Mastermind, you may [keyword:Unleash] this card from [keyword:Undercover].
[hc:covert]: You may send one of your other Heroes [keyword:Undercover].

cards.name: Champion of the Winter Guard
abilities: [keyword:When Recruited]: Send this [keyword:Undercover].
When a Scheme Twist is completed or you play your third [hc:covert] Hero in a turn, you may [keyword:Unleash] this card from [keyword:Undercover].
[hc:covert]: You get +2[icon:attack] for each other [hc:covert] Hero you played this turn.

cards.name: Dark Influence of the Hand
abilities: [keyword:Dodge]
[keyword:Dark Memories].

cards.name: Amulets of the Tiger God
abilities: Reveal the top two cards of your deck. Draw one of them that costs 0 and discard the rest.

cards.name: Camouflaged Huntress
abilities: Whenever you defeat a Henchman this turn, you may KO one of your cards.

cards.name: Shadowed Resurrection
abilities: [keyword:Dark Memories], drawing that many cards instead of gaining [icon:attack].

cards.name: Attune
abilities: To play this side, you must discard a card.

cards.name: Atone
abilities: [keyword:Dark Memories].

cards.name: Relocate
abilities: [keyword:Dodge].
[hc:instinct]: You get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Reload
abilities: [hc:tech]: Draw a card.

cards.name: New Wings
abilities: If you discarded any cards this turn, you get +4[icon:attack].

cards.name: New Plan
abilities: Draw two cards.

cards.name: Captain America's Legacy
abilities: You get +1[icon:attack] for each Hero Class you have.
[team:avengers]: [keyword:Dark Memories].

cards.name: Taskmaster
abilities: Henchmen get +1[icon:attack] for each “Henchman Training“ stacked here.
During your turn, Taskmaster gets +[icon:attack] equal to the highest cost Hero you played this turn.
Always Leads: Taskmaster's Thunderbolts
Master Strike: Stack this Strike next to Taskmaster as “Henchman Training.“ If there are any Henchmen in the city, each player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Epic Taskmaster
abilities: Henchmen get +2[icon:attack] for each “Henchman Training“ stacked here.
During your turn, Taskmaster gets +[icon:attack] equal to double the highest cost Hero you played this turn.
Always Leads: Taskmaster's Thunderbolts
Master Strike: Stack this Strike next to Taskmaster as “Henchman Training.“ If there are any Henchmen in the city, each player gains a Wound.

cards.name: S.H.I.E.L.D. Initiative Trainer
abilities: Fight: Choose a Henchman from any player's Victory Pile to enter the city.
KO any number of S.H.I.E.L.D. Agents and/or Troopers. Gain that many S.H.I.E.L.D. Officers.

cards.name: Photographic Reflexes
abilities: Fight: Choose a Henchman from any player's Victory Pile to enter the city.
Play a copy of a Hero in the HQ that costs 6 or less.

cards.name: Teacher and Assassin
abilities: Fight: Choose a Henchman from any player's Victory Pile to enter the city.
Each other player reveals their hand and puts one of their non-grey Heroes on the bottom of the Hero Deck.

cards.name: Henchman Instructor
abilities: Fight: Choose a Henchman from any player's Victory Pile to enter the city.
Then each other player discards a card for each Henchman in the city and/or Escape Pile.

cards.name: Indestructible Man
abilities: You can't use [icon:attack] to fight Indestructible Man.
Once during each of your turns, you may shuffle two Elite Assassins from your Victory Pile into the Villain Deck. If you do, fight Indestructible Man.
Always Leads: Elite Assassins
Master Strike: Shuffle an Elite Assassin from your Victory Pile into the Villain Deck. If you can't, each player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Epic Indestructible Man
abilities: You can't use [icon:attack] to fight Indestructible Man.
Once during each of your turns, you may shuffle three Elite Assassins from your Victory Pile into the Villain Deck. If you do, fight Indestructible Man.
Always Leads: Elite Assassins
Master Strike: Each player shuffles an Elite Assassin from their Victory Pile into the Villain Deck. Each player that can't gains a Wound.

cards.name: Manipulate Murderous Mad Monk
abilities: Fight: If this is not the last Tactic, rescue four Bystanders and this Tactic enters the city as a “Molot Boga“ Villain whose abilities are:
“Ambush: Play two cards from the Villain Deck.
Fight: KO one of your Heroes.
Escape: Shuffle this back into Indestructible Man's Mastermind Tactics.“

cards.name: Secrets of Indestructibility
abilities: Fight: KO up to two Wounds from your hand and/or discard pile.
If this is not the last Tactic, play two cards from the Villain Deck.

cards.name: International Arms Dealer
abilities: Fight: Gain a [hc:tech] Hero from the HQ. Each other player reveals a [hc:tech] Hero or gains a Wound.
If this is not the last Tactic, play two cards from the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Unveil Project Four
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals their hand and discards each card with a “4“ printed anywhere on it. (The copyright date line doesn't count.)
If this is not the last Tactic, play two cards from the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Jester
abilities: Ambush: Jester captures a Bystander.
Fight: Reveal the top four cards of the Villain Deck. Play all the Henchmen you find. Put the rest back in any order.

cards.name: Joystick
abilities: Ambush: Choose a Henchman from any player's Victory Pile to enter the city.

cards.name: Jack O'Lantern
abilities: Fight: Choose a Henchman from any player's Victory Pile to enter the city.
Escape: Each player with fewer than two Henchmen in their Victory Pile gains a Wound.

cards.name: Bullseye
abilities: Ambush: Choose [icon:recruit] or [icon:attack], then reveal the top card of the Hero Deck. If it has that icon, Bullseye captures it and gets +[icon:attack] equal to that Hero's cost.
Fight: The player of your choice gains the captured Hero.
Escape: KO that Hero.

cards.name: Blue Talon
abilities: [keyword:Dark Memories]
Ambush: Each player reveals a [hc:ranged] Hero or gains a Wound.
Fight: You may send a Hero from your discard pile [keyword:Undercover].

cards.name: Iron Maiden
abilities: [keyword:Dark Memories]
Ambush: Each player must send one of their non-grey Heroes [keyword:Undercover].
Fight: Each player may [keyword:Unleash] one of their Heroes from [keyword:Undercover].

cards.name: Snapdragon
abilities: Ambush: Each player discards a non-grey Hero. Then each player draws a card.
Fight: You may send one of your Heroes [keyword:Undercover].

cards.name: Black Lotus
abilities: Ambush: Each player discards a card that costs 0.
Fight: You get +3[icon:recruit].
Setup: 7 Twists.

Twist 1-6: Each player sends one of their non-grey Heroes [keyword:Undercover]. Then each player may [keyword:Unleash] a Hero from [keyword:Undercover] with a lower cost than the one that player just sent [keyword:Undercover].
Twist 7: Evil Wins!

schemes.name: Train Black Widows in the Red Room

abilities: Setup: 8 Twists, minus 1 Twist per player. Add 8 S.H.I.E.L.D. Officers to the Villain Deck.

Special Rules: Officers in the Villain Deck and city are “Black Widow Initiate“ Villains with 3+[icon:attack] and “[keyword:Dark Memories]. Fight: Gain this as an Officer (without [keyword:Dark Memories]) or send it [keyword:Undercover].“
Twist: A Black Widow Initiate enters the city from the Officer Stack. Play another card from the Villain Deck.
Evil Wins: When there 3 Villains per player in the Escape Pile or the Villain Deck runs out.
Setup: 11 Twists, minus 1 Twist per player.
Twist: Each player must [keyword:Dodge] with a Hero from their hand, revealing the card they drew. KO each non-grey Hero drawn this way.
Evil Wins: When there are four non-grey Heroes per player in the KO Pile.
Setup: 7 Twists. 6 Heroes.
Twist 1-6: Stack a card from the HQ next to the scheme as “Incriminating Evidence“ that has a different cost than any card already in that stack.
Twist 7: Add any card from the HQ to the Incriminating Evidence.
Evil Wins: When there are 5 pieces of Incriminating Evidence.
